sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ الصَّحَابَةُ الْكِرَامُ آدَابَ الطَّعَامِ مِنَ الرَّسُولِ صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ.
sentences.translation: Plemeniti ashabi su naučili adabe (pravila ponašanja) pri jelu od Poslanika, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem.
sentences.translationEn: The noble Companions learned the etiquette of eating from the Messenger (peace be upon him).

sentences.arabic: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ لِعُمَرَ بْنِ أَبِي سَلَمَةَ: "يَا غُلَامُ، سَمِّ اللهَ، وَكُلْ بِيَمِينِكَ، وَكُلْ مِمَّا يَلِيكَ" [رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ فِي كِتَابِ الْأَشْرِبَةِ، رَقْمُ 2022].
sentences.translation: Poslanik je rekao Omeru ibn Ebi Selemi: "Dječače, spomeni Allahovo ime, jedi desnom rukom i jedi ispred sebe" [Bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o pićima, br. 2022].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet said to Umar ibn Abi Salamah: "O boy, mention the name of Allah, eat with your right hand, and eat from what is in front of you" [Reported by Muslim in the Book of Drinks, No. 2022].

sentences.arabic: هَذَا تَوْجِيهٌ نَبَوِيٌّ لِتَعْلِيمِ الْأَطْفَالِ التَّسْمِيَةَ وَالْأَكْلَ بِالْيَدِ الْيُمْنَى.
sentences.translation: Ovo je proročka uputa za podučavanje djece bismilli i jelu desnom rukom.
sentences.translationEn: This is prophetic guidance for teaching children to say 'Bismillah' and eat with the right hand.

sentences.arabic: يَدُلُّ هَذَا الْحَدِيثُ عَلَى أَهَمِّيَّةِ التَّوَاضُعِ وَالنِّظَامِ عِنْدَ الْأَكْلِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj hadis ukazuje na važnost skromnosti i reda tokom jela.
sentences.translationEn: This hadith indicates the importance of humility and order while eating.

sentences.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ يَشْكُرُ اللهَ عَلَى النِّعْمَةِ دَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Musliman uvijek zahvaljuje Allahu na blagodati.
sentences.translationEn: A Muslim always thanks Allah for the blessing.
